completion_rule: Requirement -> Module -> Artifact -> Test or waiver -> Evidence -> Runtime state -> Rollback -> Owner acceptance

last_reconciliation.truth_boundary: Repository and bounded-source completion only. Live providers, production promotion, complete historical source universe and owner acceptance remain separate gates.
